instructions.summary: Add vector elements from two vector registers

description.Description: Adds each element in vs2 to the corresponding element in vs1 and writes the result to vd.
description.Operation: foreach active element: vd[i] = vs2[i] + vs1[i]

instructions.summary: Add vector elements from two vector registers under a mask

description.Description: Performs vector-vector addition only for elements enabled by the mask.
description.Operation: foreach active masked element: vd[i] = vs2[i] + vs1[i]

instructions.summary: Add vector elements while preserving inactive tail elements

description.Description: Performs vector-vector addition with tail-undisturbed policy.
description.Operation: foreach active element: vd[i] = vs2[i] + vs1[i]; inactive tail elements remain unchanged

instructions.summary: Add vector elements with mask-undisturbed and tail-undisturbed policy

description.Description: Performs masked vector-vector addition with tail-undisturbed and mask-undisturbed behavior.
description.Operation: foreach active masked element: vd[i] = vs2[i] + vs1[i]; inactive lanes remain unchanged

instructions.summary: Subtract vector elements from another vector register

description.Description: Subtracts each element in vs1 from the corresponding element in vs2 and writes the result to vd.
description.Operation: foreach active element: vd[i] = vs2[i] - vs1[i]

instructions.summary: Subtract vector elements under a mask

description.Description: Performs vector-vector subtraction only for elements enabled by the mask.
description.Operation: foreach active masked element: vd[i] = vs2[i] - vs1[i]

instructions.summary: Load 32-bit elements from contiguous memory

description.Description: Loads vector elements from consecutive 32-bit memory locations starting at rs1.
description.Operation: foreach active element: vd[i] = MEM[rs1 + i * 4]

instructions.summary: Store 32-bit elements to contiguous memory

description.Description: Stores vector elements to consecutive 32-bit memory locations starting at rs1.
description.Operation: foreach active element: MEM[rs1 + i * 4] = vs3[i]

instructions.summary: Load 32-bit elements from memory with a byte stride

description.Description: Loads vector elements from memory addresses separated by a stride held in rs2.
description.Operation: foreach active element: vd[i] = MEM[rs1 + i * rs2]

instructions.summary: Store 32-bit elements to memory with a byte stride

description.Description: Stores vector elements to memory addresses separated by a stride held in rs2.
description.Operation: foreach active element: MEM[rs1 + i * rs2] = vs3[i]

instructions.summary: Load 32-bit elements using unordered indices

description.Description: Loads elements from addresses formed by adding rs1 to the byte offsets in vs2.
description.Operation: foreach active element: vd[i] = MEM[rs1 + vs2[i]]

instructions.summary: Store 32-bit elements using unordered indices

description.Description: Stores elements to addresses formed by adding rs1 to the byte offsets in vs2.
description.Operation: foreach active element: MEM[rs1 + vs2[i]] = vs3[i]

instructions.summary: Compute a mask-register AND

description.Description: Computes the logical AND of two mask registers.
description.Operation: vd.mask = vs2.mask & vs1.mask

instructions.summary: Reduce vector elements with a sum

description.Description: Reduces active vector elements using addition and writes the final sum to vd[0].
description.Operation: sum = vs1[0]; foreach active element: sum += vs2[i]; vd[0] = sum

instructions.summary: Widen and add vector elements

description.Description: Widens each source element before addition and writes widened results to vd.
description.Operation: foreach active element: vd[i] = widen(vs2[i]) + widen(vs1[i])

instructions.summary: Narrow fixed-point unsigned values with clipping

description.Description: Narrows fixed-point elements after rounding and clips values that exceed the destination range.
description.Operation: foreach active element: vd[i] = clip_unsigned(round(vs2[i] >> uimm))

instructions.summary: Zero-extend vector elements by a factor of two

description.Description: Widens each source element by zero-extending it to twice the SEW.
description.Operation: foreach active element: vd[i] = zero_extend(vs2[i])

instructions.summary: Gather vector elements using vector indices

description.Description: Permutes source elements using indices provided by another vector register.
description.Operation: foreach active element: vd[i] = vs2[vs1[i]]

instructions.summary: Move the first vector element to a scalar register

description.Description: Copies the lowest-numbered active vector element into an integer scalar register.
description.Operation: x[rd] = sign_extend(vs2[0])

instructions.summary: Perform the final AES decryption round on vector elements

description.Description: Applies the final-round AES decryption transform to vector state using vector round keys.
description.Operation: foreach active element group: vd = AESDecryptFinal(vs2, vs1)
